ingredients_text: Chopped Pork 80% (Pork (81%), Water, Wheat Flour (Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin), Salt, Pea Starch, Modified Maize Starch, Cardamom, Yeast Extract, Sugar, Spice Extracts, (Pepper, Mace, Nutmeg), Stabilisers (E450), Pea Fibre, Preservatives (E250, E252), Antioxidant (E301)), Egg 20% (Egg (98%), Modified Maize Starch, Salt, Acidy Regulator (E330)).
